_meta.description: D6 fixtures for hermes / readonly-state-agent-context. The demo publishes name/timezone/recentActivity via useAgentContext; the hermes AG-UI adapter injects RunAgentInput.context as a system message (translate.context_to_text), so this is plain chat that references the injected context. Keyed on the verbatim suggestion-pill prompts.

fixtures._comment: readonly-state-agent-context — 'Who am I?' pill. Matches the verbatim pill prompt. Reply begins 'I see you're Atai' so the e2e assistant-message filter matches.

match.userMessage: What do you know about me from my context?

response.content: I see you're Atai, and you're in the America/Los_Angeles timezone. Recently, you viewed the pricing page and watched the product demo video. How can I help?

fixtures._comment: readonly-state-agent-context — 'Suggest next steps' pill. Matches the verbatim pill prompt. Reply begins 'Since you recently viewed the pricing page and watched the product demo video'.

match.userMessage: Based on my recent activity, what should I try next?

response.content: Since you recently viewed the pricing page and watched the product demo video, a natural next step is to start the 14-day free trial so you can experience the Pro Plan features firsthand. Browsing customer testimonials or case studies is another good option to see how similar teams got value.

fixtures._comment: readonly-state-agent-context — 'Plan my morning' pill. Matches the verbatim pill prompt; grounds the reply in the injected timezone context.

match.userMessage: What time is it in my timezone and what should I do for the next hour?

response.content: Based on your America/Los_Angeles timezone, it's mid-morning for you. For the next hour I'd suggest kicking off the 14-day free trial and setting up your first project — that builds naturally on the pricing page and product demo you already looked at.
